prompt:
You are shown one page from a SEC 10-K filing rendered as an image.
Item "9B. Other Information" ENDS on this page; the next section is "Item 9C. Disclosure Regarding Foreign Jurisdictions that Prevent Inspections".
First locate where Item 9B stops on this page:
- If the "Item 9C" heading is visible on this page, Item 9B ends on the line directly ABOVE that heading.
- Ignore ALL text below that heading; it belongs to the next section, not Item 9B.
- The target section may have started on a previous page and may leave only a short carryover at the very TOP of this page.
- If the next-section heading appears near the top, the answer may be only the few lines immediately above that heading.
- Only if no later section heading appears on this page should you use the bottom of the page as Item 9B's ending.
Then transcribe VERBATIM the LAST 5 lines of Item 9B right before the section ends. The answer must come only from Item 9B, even if the next section occupies most of the page. Ignore running headers, page numbers, footers.
Output ONLY the transcribed text, no commentary, no quotes, no formatting.
text:
(5) Ann Mather, a member of the Board of Directors, entered into a pre-arranged stock trading plan pursuant to Rule 10b5-1 on November 7, 2025. Ms. Mather's
plan provides for the potential exercise of vested stock options and the associated sale of up to 23,430 shares of Netflix common stock. The plan expires on
December 31, 2025, or upon the earlier completion or all authorized transactions under the plan.

Other than those disclosed above, none of our directors or officers adopted or terminated a "non-Rule 10b5-1 trading arrangement" as defined in
Item 408 of Regulation S-K.
